---
title: "Move VCF file to a shared lab folder"
author: "Jinliang Yang"
date: "-05-07-2024"
output: NULL
---

```{r setup}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE) 
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir=normalizePath('..//')) 
```


### move data on HCC

- raw data obtained from [Boatwright et al., 2022]()
- Hongyu corrected the header or the label using a SNP matching approach!

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
mkdir /common/jyanglab/shared/dbcenter/SAP
cp /common/jyanglab/subhash/SNPallchrs/1.raw_data__corrected/* /common/jyanglab/shared/dbcenter/SAP
```

Some further steps needed to double-check the genotype labels
1. do plant height GWAS (see if the well known dwarf genes will show up)
2. do IBS analysis with tGBS data by [Miao et al., 2020]()

### Download the sorghum reference genome

SorghumV3.fa (BTx623) V3
Move to the newest version V5

possibly from this websites:
1. https://plants.ensembl.org/Sorghum_bicolor/Info/Index
2. https://phytozome-next.jgi.doe.gov/info/Sbicolor_v3_1_1
3. https://ensembl.sorghumbase.org/Sorghum_tx430nano/Info/Index


#### Calculate some basic stat

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
module load bcftools
#changing ID to chrom_pos to compare manual and plink2.0 calculation
bcftools annotate --set-id +'%CHROM\_%POS' SAP.vcf.gz -Ov -o SAP_addid.vcf.gz

#making bed file from vcf (format of plink2.0)
plink2 --vcf SAPo.vcf.gz --make-bed --out /work/jyanglab/subhash/snp_sorghum/1.sap_genotype_files/2.plink2.0_bed/SAPo

```
